item.title: Music
item.description: Music Last Update: 2025-10-13 Albums & EPs 2022 Boring Album Release Date: 2022/12/25 Total Length: 31:03 Composer Track Name BPM Length Boring Game Ice 100-200 02:03 Boring Game Happy 350 02:07 Boring Game Why 100-300 04:26 Boring Game Monster 180 02:14 Boring Game Hand 120 02:28 Boring Game Anxious Person 120 02:12 Boring Game Psychosis 111.11 02:43 Boring Game Rain 99.9 02:22 Boring Game This Is Not a Rabbit 50 02:44 Boring Game Knife 80 02:30 Boring Game Die 100 03:00 Boring Game Red 200 02:09 2023 Bad Life Release Date: 2023/01/08 Total Length: 1:04:51 Composer Track Name BPM Length Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 0| 100 08:05 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 1| 100 12:07 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 2| 50-100 07:22 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 3| 60-120 07:16 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 4| 10-1000 07:59 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 5| 120-200 11:22 Boring Game Bad Life |Chapter 6| 40-190 10:37 Boring Album 2 Release Date: 2023/05/01 Total Length: 35:07 Composer Track Name BPM Length Boring Game Meaningless Song 130-260 02:12 Boring Game Broken Music 80-1200 02:01 Boring Game Wreckage 120 02:14 Boring Game Corpse 150 02:13 Boring Game Light 117 03:23 Boring Game Hjärna 80-200 02:57 Boring Game Paradise 66.
